title: 秘密のデート！？心たぎるランデブー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after Kawakami Princess's debut, I've been
entering her in scrimmages in addition to regular
races to get her more familiar with competing.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Phew!
choice_data_list: Your running is getting better than before!
Your running is getting better than before!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, you really mean it?! Then I'm ready for
another race!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... W-wait. I need a breather...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer <username>.
Seeing as our runners are both in their junior year
still, I think we should be careful not to overdo
it...
choice_data_list: You're right. Thanks a lot for today.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I learned a lot from you. Let's do this
again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ughhh... But I'm still packed full of energy... I was
just on the brink of getting a real feel for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, there isn't anyone left for her to
race today. So instead...
choice_data_list: How about trying some visualization training?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Visualization training?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... This is a race with eighteen runners. At the moment, sixteen are ahead of me...
choice_data_list: Focus! The runner behind you is closing in!
Focus! The runner behind you is closing in!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gah... Huff... Huff... Grrr...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ugh! But I'm the only one here!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Imagine all I want, it's still only me! Competition
is a fierce back-and-forth marked by sweat and
determination—this doesn't have any of that!
choice_data_list:
Doesn't Princess Fighter do this kind of
training?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gah?! Are you talking about the imaginary race in
episode twenty-two where Princess Fighter faces
fifty versions of herself?
choice_data_list:
If you can do that too, you'll become even
stronger.

If you can do that too, you'll become even
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Nghhh...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Mumble... In this race, the Umamusume with the hair bow is... Mumble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I gave her that advice, Kawakami Princess
has been poring over race footage of other
Umamusume to serve as references for her
visualization training.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's the sixth one down.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But still, nothing beats watching a race live. The
drive to tear each other apart. The spectators
going wild in the stands...
choice_data_list: Should we go see a race in person soon, then?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The Queen Elizabeth II Cuuup?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I've brought Kawakami Princess with me
to Kyoto to watch the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer, is this really the Queen Elizabeth II Cup?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Whoooooa! The race where they decide who's the
ultimate princess—the queen! I'm going to enter
this race too, one day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I must confess she seems a little more excited
than I imagined...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I'm sure that seeing a live race in action will
be a good experience for her.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which Umamusume will shine bright as the
queen?! A total of eighteen participants will
compete on today's track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Next to appear on the turf is Sweep Tosho! She
recently overwhelmed her opponents en route to
victory at the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Blond Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Sweep! Please make sure you get to the
gate early today!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
...My goodness. The caliber of the younger
Umamusume entering this race has certainly
changed.

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text: I concur. Sigh... If she's entering too, then I hope this doesn't turn into a repeat of the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Bleeeeh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race turns out to be an intense nail-biter.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The leader splendidly breaks away from the rest
of the pack. Have we already decided our new
queen?! But wait, coming from the outside is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! She's gaining ground rapidly from
the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're even! Sweep Tosho mounted a ferocious
pursuit from the outside and has now pulled
ahead! She's first! Sweep Tosho comes in first
place!

text_block_list.name: Blond Spectator
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah! Go Sweep! You killed that! You're the
beeeest!

text_block_list.name: Blue-haired Spectator
text_block_list.text:
That finishing burst was crazy cool. Hey, make
sure you win the next one too, Sweep!

text_block_list.name: Lady with Hat
text_block_list.text:
She performed well today, including making it to
the starting gate on time. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph... You see that? That's the power of magic.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho, you put on a magnificent
performance today! Would you share a few words
on how you're feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Not interested! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Sweep Tosho?! Wait, come back!

text_block_list.name: Lady in a Dress
text_block_list.text:
She's still behaving more like a bratty princess. I can
only hope that next year she will display a little more of
the decorum befitting a queen.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: So that was the Queen Elizabeth II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wooooow!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do it, too! I'm going to win this race
one day and become queen!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I need your help! Let's do some training
right away!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Back to the academy, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We hurry back to the academy and manage to
slip in while there's still time to use the track.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess enters the gate. The Queen
Elizabeth II Cup is about to begin...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ka-chak!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And they're off! Phoooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tonight, she's decided to base her visualization
training on the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. But she
seems different from before...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oookaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's finally able to practice on her own through
visualizing a race.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer, one day... One day, I swear...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup and
become my ideal princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah! I'm gonna make this happeeeen!
